case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. PAMELA D GERSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GERSTEIN, PAMELA D DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-07-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
